title: Bows & Crossbows 3D
description: Makes the bow and crossbow have the 3D model of arrow or rocket projectile
body:
This is a texture pack that changes bow and crossbow (with all their pulling stages) to make the arrow (or rocket in crossbows) texture use the projectile 3D model and texture, so it looks like the arrow is actually being pulled.

### Working on:
Versions 1.21.4 and above will have the original 2D textures of bow and crossbow in inventory, while having the new 3D models when in hand.
